messages.subject: Welcome to Vectrix — onboarding kickoff
messages.body:
Hi Maria,

Welcome to Vectrix! I'm so glad we got the paperwork across the finish line this week.

I'm setting up your organization in the system today. A few things to get you started:

1. Your SDK install guide: https://docs.vectrix.io/quickstart
2. Marcus Webb (our CTO) is CC'd here — he's available for any technical setup questions.
3. I'll send your PagerDuty integration setup doc separately.

We have a kickoff call scheduled for Jan 14 at 10am PT. I'll send the calendar invite shortly. Looking forward to working with you.

— Tessa

messages.subject: Re: Welcome to Vectrix — onboarding kickoff
messages.body:
Hi Tessa,

Good kickoff call today. SDK is installed and we're seeing events come in.

One thing I want to flag: we specifically chose Vectrix in part because we were told comparison mode (week-over-week endpoint performance) was coming in the v2 dashboard release. If that feature is deferred or descoped, I need to know now — that affects how we plan our Q1 reliability review with our engineering leadership.

Can you confirm the timeline?

Thanks,
Maria Chen
VP Engineering, Cascade Systems

messages.subject: Re: Welcome to Vectrix — onboarding kickoff
messages.body:
Hi Maria,

Thank you for raising this directly — I want to give you a straight answer.

Comparison mode is in our Dashboard v2 roadmap. Dana Reeves (our Head of Product, CC'd here) can give you the specific timeline. Dana, can you send Maria the v2 launch target and where comparison mode sits in the scope?

Maria — I can commit that if the timeline shifts in a way that materially affects your Q1 planning, you'll hear from me directly before it's announced elsewhere.

— Tessa

messages.subject: Re: Welcome to Vectrix — onboarding kickoff
messages.body:
Hi Maria,

I'm Dana, Head of Product. Comparison mode (week-over-week and custom date range comparison) is confirmed in the Dashboard v2 scope with a target launch of late February. It's one of our top three features for the release alongside saved views and the core layout redesign.

I'll make sure you're among the first to know when we lock the final launch date.

Welcome aboard — looking forward to having Cascade as a reference customer.

— Dana Reeves
messages.internal_note: Note: Dana's email here says comparison mode is confirmed for v2. This contradicts the Feb 17 Slack decision deferring it to v2.1. Both are part of the version conflict edge case for 'email contradicts Slack decision'.
